summary: SDM Rewards - Monthly Analytics Month Selector and Admin PIN Change Bug Fix - All tests passed (9/9 backend, 100% frontend). Tested: Monthly Analytics API with month parameter, Admin PIN change for super admin (emileparfait2003@gmail.com), English text throughout Admin Dashboard.
critical_code_review_comments: The PIN change fix is correct - admin_email comparison uses .lower() to handle case-insensitive email matching (line 2321 in admin.py)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Monthly analytics with month selector and admin PIN change are working correctly. The PIN change endpoint only allows super admin (emileparfait2003@gmail.com) to change the PIN.

mocked_apis_list: BulkClix SMS - SMS_TEST_MODE=true, SMS are logged but not sent

frontend.status: ✅ PASS - HTML5 month picker visible with data-testid='month-selector'

backend.status: ✅ PASS - Returns transactions, volume, new_clients, new_merchants, cashback_distributed, card_sales

Admin_PIN_Change_Bug_Fix.issue: PIN change was failing for super admin
Admin_PIN_Change_Bug_Fix.fix_applied: Added .lower() to email comparison (line 2321: admin_email = current_admin.get('email', '').lower())
tests_passed: ✅ PIN change rejects invalid format (non-digits, too short)

api_verification_results.monthly_analytics: ✅ PASS - Returns correct structure with all fields
